## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (add/update tests for new behavior)
- [ ] `npm audit` is clean (or new warnings are documented)
- [ ] Updated AGENTS.md if the repo layout, conventions, or tool
      inventory changed
- [ ] Updated HANDOFF.md if a session-level decision needs to
      survive into future context
- [ ] No personal paths, tokens, or local scratch files committed
